title: ZENO Disposable Dehumidifier 500ml | Moisture Absorber Dehumidifiers for Damp, Mould, Moisture in Home, Kitchen, Wardrobe, Bedroom, Caravan | Dehumidifiers Disposable | Damp Absorber (120 Pack)
features: ULTRA POWERFUL MOISTURE ABSORPTION - This disposable dehumidifier delivers strong 3X moisture absorption to help tackle damp, condensation, and humidity in your living spaces. It continuously pulls excess moisture from the air to help protect against mould, mildew, and musty smells.

PERFECT FOR SMALL SPACES - Ideal for use in bedrooms, kitchens, wardrobes, cupboards, garages, or even inside caravans where dampness tends to build up. Its compact and low-profile design fits neatly wherever you need reliable moisture control.

NO MAINTENANCE OR SETUP NEEDED - Just open the top and place the unit where required to start absorbing moisture immediately. There is no need for electricity, no need for refills, and no complicated instructions.
LEAKPROOF AND SAFE TO USE - Built with a sealed anti-leak container to safely hold up to 500ml of moisture without risk of spills. Safe to place near fabrics, electronics, or furniture without worry.

CREATES A FRESHER, DRIER ENVIRONMENT - By removing excess humidity from the air, this dehumidifier helps eliminate unpleasant odours and keeps rooms feeling fresh and dry. It works continuously for weeks, making it perfect for long-term use or seasonal protection.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Previous page Next page How does the Zeno interior dehumidifier work? It uses moisture-absorbing beads to pull dampness from the air, helping prevent mould, mildew, and musty smells. Where can I use it? It's perfect for wardrobes, cupboards, bathrooms, windowsills, and other small enclosed spaces. Does it need electricity? No power is needed. Just open it, place it, and let it work silently around the clock. How long does one unit last? Depending on humidity levels, each dehumidifier can last several weeks before needing replacement. Is it safe to use around pets and children? Yes, as long as it's placed out of reach. The sealed design keeps contents secure while in use.
